description: Create a two-column content slide on availability of external financing in 2019 vs 2018, with a horizontal comparison chart on the left and summary bullets on the right.

header.kicker: Competitive dynamics and the private equity business model
header.headline: External financing, especially refinancing and recapitalization, is expected to become slightly more difficult in 2019

main.title: "Compared to 2018, how easily available will external financing be in 2019?"

items.text: Overall, the external financing situation is expected to be slightly more difficult in 2019 compared to 2018:
Refinancing and recapitalization are expected to become more difficult in 2019
Expectations for growth financing have changed the least between the two years
